text.title: ui-component-library Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ui-component-library as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Libraries must declare `react` as a peer dependency; listing it as a regular dependency forces duplicate React instances in consumers, causing hook errors.

failure-mode.description: Adding `:global(.foo)` CSS selector inside CSS Modules.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Global selectors leak out of the component and affect elements elsewhere in the host app unpredictably.
